overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking through a foggy industrial dock during golden hour. The character moves along wooden piers past warehouses and cargo, circles a large paddle steamer, and approaches dock workers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the warehouse district

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders standing near wooden crates, watching the dock

entered.detail: large dark wooden industrial building with multiple windows
tall wooden pole with crossbars and hanging lantern
stacked wooden shipping crates on the dock
two-story wooden warehouse with 'Madison & Co' painted signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy wooden dock flanked by industrial warehouses. The golden sun backlights the scene through heavy haze. An NPC stands near wooden crates on the left as the camera approaches the Madison & Co building.

events.description: turns right at Madison & Co building, revealing the river and paddle steamer

agents.ego_description: turning right at the warehouse corner and continuing along the riverside

notable_agents.action: man in work clothes leaning against railing, looking at the water

entered.detail: large two-story riverboat with red trim and white railings, steam stack visible
calm water reflecting the golden light
tall factory smokestacks visible across the river in the fog

segments.scene_description: Turning the corner at Madison & Co, the scene opens to a wide riverside view. A large paddle steamer emerges from the fog on the right, docked along the wooden pier. Industrial chimneys rise in the distant haze across the water.

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dock beside the paddle steamer, observing the boat

entered.detail: vertical wooden posts supporting the dock structure
thick wooden bollards for tying boats

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the narrow wooden walkway skirting the paddle steamer. The boat's white railings and red trim pass by on the left as the dock extends into the foggy river, with industrial buildings visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock worker area with cargo and barrels

events.description: turns back toward the main dock area, approaching workers

agents.ego_description: approaching dock workers near wooden barrels, with the player character visible from behind wearing suspenders

notable_agents.action: dock worker crouching near barrels, then standing up as camera approaches
worker standing on elevated platform overlooking the water

entered.detail: stacks of wooden barrels and sacks of cargo
tall masts of sailing ships docked in the fog
dark wooden dock building with loading doors

segments.scene_description: Turning back toward the main dock, the camera approaches workers handling cargo. Wooden barrels line the left side while sailing ships are moored in the foggy distance. The player character, visible from behind in suspenders, walks toward a worker who rises from crouching near the cargo.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial dock that transitions from a narrow warehouse corridor to an open riverside vista. It begins with the character walking along a wooden pier flanked by industrial warehouses, where the golden sun backlights a heavy haze and an NPC stands near crates by the Madison & Co building. As the camera turns the corner, the scene opens to a wide river view where a large paddle steamer emerges from the fog against a backdrop of distant industrial chimneys. The perspective then shifts to follow a narrow walkway skirting the white railings and red trim of the steamer before turning back toward the main dock. Finally, the camera moves past rows of wooden barrels toward dock workers handling cargo, with sailing ships moored in the foggy distance as the character in suspenders approaches a crouching worker.
